2026-06-18ESDCCanada Labour CodeResidency exemption within the Canada Industrial Relations BoardOrder exempting two Governor in Council appointees of the Canada Industrial Relations Board from the National Capital Region residency requirement set out in section 10.1 of the Canada Labour Code.N/A
subject: Residency exemption within the Canada Industrial Relations Board
precis: Order exempting two Governor in Council appointees of the Canada Industrial Relations Board from the National Capital Region residency requirement set out in section 10.1 of the Canada Labour Code.
